name: PM-Kisan
detail: Income support for eligible farmer families through direct benefit transfer.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with valid land and identity records.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
detail: Crop insurance support against yield loss from weather, pests, and calamities.
eligibility: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.

name: Soil Health Card
detail: Soil nutrient testing and crop-wise fertilizer recommendations.
eligibility: Farmers with cultivable land and sample collection access.

name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization
detail: Support for farm machinery, custom hiring centers, and mechanized operations.
eligibility: Farmers, groups, cooperatives, and eligible institutions.

name: Rythu Bandhu
detail: Seasonal investment support for eligible farmers in Telangana.
eligibility: Eligible land-owning farmers as per state records.
